description: Italian startup operating marketplace connecting consumers with healthcare professionals including doctors, dentists, and therapists. Leading services marketplace in Italy with healthcare as a major vertical.
business_model: B2C - Marketplace model; B2B - Marketing services to professionals
key_investors: United Ventures, Primo Ventures, Vertis SGR
competitive_advantage: Market leader in Italy, strong brand, multi-vertical platform

varden_fit.rationale: Distribution channel in Italy - could feature occupational health services
